name: Summer Fruit, Honey, and Hazelnut Crumble
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Mixed soft summer fruits (raspberries, loganberries, strawberries, currants, bilberries or whatever is available)
Honey or brown sugar to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the mixed soft summer fruits in a pan or microwave-safe dish with about 1 inch of water at the bottom.
2. Cook gently for 10-15 minutes (or 4-6 minutes in the microwave) until the fruits are soft but not mushy.
3. Sweeten to taste using honey or brown sugar.
4. Drain excess juice and set aside for serving.
5. Chop hazelnuts in a food processor until they are nearly as fine as breadcrumbs, but not completely.
6. Mix the chopped hazelnuts with wholewheat breadcrumbs.
7. Spoon the cooked fruits into an ovenproof dish and cover with a thick layer of the nut and breadcrumb mixture.
8. Bake at 180°C (moderate oven) for 20 to 30 minutes until the top is slightly crunchy and browned.
9. Serve with lots of cream or plain yogurt and warmed fruit juices.
